channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Cal women fall to Notre Dame in ACC tournament, but Big Dance awaits Golden Bears
item.description: The Cal Bears put a scare into the No. 6 ranked Irish in the ACC tournament loss and will be back on the court soon for the NCAA Tournament as a likely No. 8 seed.
item.dc:creator: Mercury News staff and wire reports, The Mercury News

item.title: Rantanen dealt to Dallas, lands 8-year contract; Panthers add Marchand at NHL trade deadline
item.description: Mikko Rantanen went back West — but with the Dallas Stars this time following a brief stint in Carolina. And Bruins captain Brad Marchand is leaving Boston after 16 seasons to join the defending Stanley Cup champion Florida Panthers.
item.dc:creator: JOHN WAWROW and STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: NJ's top pitcher Sophia Bordi joins elite college program
item.description: NEW JERSEY (PIX11) -- It's time to meet our athlete of the week, and she's one of the best to ever play high school softball in New Jersey -- ace pitcher Sophia Bordi.
item.dc:creator: Perry Sook, PIX 11

item.title: Florida Panthers add veteran Brad Marchand as they gear up for run at another Stanley Cup title
item.description: SUNRISE, Fla. (AP) — The Florida Panthers welcomed the arrival of Boston Bruins captain Brad Marchand in a Friday trade that adds even more grit and experience to the roster of the defending Stanley Cup champions.
item.dc:creator: ALANIS THAMES, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Xander Schauffele makes a late push and extends his PGA Tour cut streak to 58 in a row
item.description: ORLANDO, Fla. (AP) — After two months without competition, PGA and British Open champion Xander Schauffele set modest expectations at Bay Hill and achieved one of his goals at the Arnold Palmer Invitational. He gets two more rounds.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Trump admin investigation finds Maine Dept. of Education violated Title IX
item.description: On Feb. 25, the U.S. Department of Health and Human Services sent a notice of violation against the Maine Department of Education.
item.dc:creator: Cassie Buchman, NewsNation

item.title: Mark Cuban tells Dallas TV station he would have asked for more in return for Doncic
item.description: Former Dallas Mavericks majority owner Mark Cuban says he wouldn’t have traded Luka Doncic to the Los Angeles Lakers without receiving much more in return.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Shaun White kicks off new league with visions of snowboarding riches on the halfpipe
item.description: ASPEN, Colo. (AP) — Shaun White's next trick might carry more risk than the flips and twists he pulled off for decades inside all those halfpipes he used to dominate. This time, it's about making magic — and money — for the generation of snowboarders who looked up to him for all those years.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: SEC fines Ole Miss $500,000 for court storming and suggests easing future penalties
item.description: The Southeastern Conference has fined Ole Miss $500,000 for violating league policy that prohibits fans from storming courts.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Washington Commanders release defensive tackle Jonathan Allen
item.description: Six weeks after their playoff run ended with a loss to eventual Super Bowl-champion Philadelphia, the Washington Commanders parted ways with one of their defensive leaders and brought back another.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Lake Placid awaits word on whether it'll be picked as the Olympic sliding site for 2026 Games
item.description: Picture this: A sliding athlete wins an Olympic medal in Lake Placid next winter, then is chauffeured down to New York for an award ceremony at Rockefeller Center a few days later with thousands of people there to cheer on both moments.
item.dc:creator: Tim Reynolds, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: At beginning of tough stretch, Lakers show grit with overtime victory over Knicks
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — It is fitting that in a town built on movies and television, JJ Redick likes to use a popular directing term to refer to different moments in his first season as coach of the Los Angeles Lakers. On Thursday night, the Lakers provided Redick with another memorable callback moment.
item.dc:creator: JOE REEDY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Doncic and James propel Lakers to 113-109 overtime victory over Knicks for 8th straight win
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Luka Doncic scored 32 points, LeBron James added 31 and the Los Angeles Lakers extended their winning streak to eight games by overcoming a double-digit deficit in the fourth quarter and defeating the New York Knicks 113-109 in overtime Thursday night.
item.dc:creator: JOE REEDY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Lightning acquire Gourde,Bjorkstrand as NHL trade action heats up
item.description: The Tampa Bay Lightning have answered the cross-state-rival and defending Stanley Cup champion Florida Panthers' first couple of additions ahead of the NHL trade deadline with a big move of their own.
item.dc:creator: Stephen Whyno, WFLA, NBC

item.title: 49ers donate $20K in equipment to 3 Santa Clara high schools
item.description: (KRON) -- Students and athletes at three Santa Clara high schools will be stepping up their game after the San Francisco 49ers recently donated more than $20,000 worth of workout and football training equipment.
item.dc:creator: Ryan Mense, KRON4

item.title: Gerlinde Kaltenbrunner climbed the world's 14 highest peaks without oxygen or porters
item.description: Gerlinde Kaltenbrunner, an Austrian-born mountaineer, became the first woman to climb the world's 14 highest peaks without the help of oxygen or porters.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, Fox 5

item.title: WNBA champion invests in Bay Area sports franchise
item.description: (KRON) – WNBA champion and Bay Area native Sabrina Ionescu was announced as an investor and commercial advisor for the Bay Football Club. Ionescu, who is also a three-time All-Star and Olympic gold medalist, announced her involvement with Bay FC on Instagram.
item.dc:creator: Jordan Baker, KRON4

item.title: 1A, 2A, 3A, 4A basketball brackets are out, as 5A & 6A Sweet 16s are set
item.description: Postseason basketball has officially ramped up and is in full swing. Here is where every local team stands.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Jazz lose to Pelicans in battle for last place, 128-121
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The victories just aren't that important right now for the Utah Jazz. Getting their younger players game experience in the priority, and plenty of young guys saw the floor Sunday in a 128-121 loss to New Orleans Sunday night at the Delta Center.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Luka scores 29 points and LeBron adds 17 in the Lakers' 2nd straight win over the Clippers, 108-102
item.description: Luka Doncic had 29 points and nine assists, LeBron James added 17 points and the Los Angeles Lakers hung on to beat the Los Angeles Clippers for the second time in three days, 108-102 on Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Naomi Girma is injured on her Chelsea debut after world record transfer
item.description: Naomi Girma, women’s soccer's first million-dollar player, was injured and substituted on her Chelsea debut on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: JAMES ROBSON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Bears prospects to watch at the NFL Scouting Combine: Offensive line
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS, Ind. (WGN) — It's the final day of workouts at the NFL Scouting Combine, and Sunday's position group is the one with the most buzz around them when it comes to the Chicago Bears—offensive line.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: BYU wins sixth straight, cruising past West Virginia
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Fousseyni Traore recorded the 21st double-double of his career on Saturday evening as No. 25 BYU defeated West Virginia 77-56 in front of a sold-out Marriott Center. “It was an ultimate tale of two halves," head coach Kevin Young said.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Runnin' Utes trounce Arizona State, 99-73
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) - Ezra Ausar scored 25 points and Utah put up 58 points in the second half to pull away from Arizona State to earn its first win under interim coach Josh Eilert, 99-73 on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: San Diego FC makes its home debut before a sellout crowd in a city hungry for top-level soccer
item.description: A match decades in the making finally happens Saturday night when San Diego FC debuts on its home field in front of a sellout crowd of fans starved for elite professional sports — and particularly hungry for top-level soccer.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Florida Panthers acquire D Seth Jones in a trade with the Chicago Blackhawks
item.description: The defending Stanley Cup champion Florida Panthers acquired defenseman Seth Jones in a trade with the Chicago Blackhawks on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Ex-NFLer Chris Kluwe says he was fired from job after MAGA protest
item.description: Former NFL punter Chris Kluwe said he was fired from his high school football coaching position after a MAGA plaque protest.
item.dc:creator: Patrick Djordjevic, NewsNation

item.title: Coby White scores 24 points and Chicago Bulls top Raptors in overtime, 125-115
item.description: Coby White scored 24 points, including a clutch four-point play, and the Bulls rallied to beat the Toronto Raptors 125-115 in overtime on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9
